mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_order_detail (cl_order_id, product_id, order_qty, unit_price, detail_memo) VALUES (#{clOrderId}, #{productId}, #{orderQty}, (SELECT unit_price FROM product WHERE product_id = #{productId}), #{detailMemo})
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, p.product_name FROM client_order_detail d LEFT JOIN product p ON d.product_id = p.product_id WHERE d.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId} ORDER BY d.detail_id
